# Final Review Aggregate

## Accepted

## Rejected

## Final Accepted Amendments

### `fr-6-cbffa3f4`

**Classification:** fix_current_bead

src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs:622 commits the squashed work before the fallible push and PR steps at src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs:629 and src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs:636, but each invocation first rejects any non-checkpoint commit in origin/master..HEAD at src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs:535. After a transient git push failure or gh pr create failure, the repo is left with the final `<bead-id>: <title>` commit, so rerunning `ralph-burning pr open` fails with `NonCheckpointCommits` instead of resuming push/PR creation. Make the command idempotent for an already-rendered squash commit, or otherwise allow retry after post-commit failures, and add regression coverage for rerunning after push and PR-create failures.
